title: ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING - 211info
text: COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry, showers, propane, tarps, and blankets. Also provides sleeping bags when available. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as homeless Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-2176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97424 (Lane County only), 97426, 97434, and 97451 SITE HOURS: Monday 1:30pm-6pm and Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West on Main Street to N Street, turn right 2 blocks to Birch Street. LTD stop at Main and N Streets (2-minute walk). Services: Bedding/Linen * Homelessness Issues Camping Gear * Homelessness Issues Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Homelessness Issues Laundry Facilities * Homelessness Issues Public Showers/Baths * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - BABY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
